description.en: Network diagnostic and error reporting protocol. Used by ping (echo request/reply) and traceroute (time exceeded). Reports unreachable hosts, network errors and routing problems.
description.zh: 网络诊断和错误报告协议。ping（回显请求/应答）和traceroute（超时）都基于ICMP。用于报告主机不可达、网络错误和路由问题。

type.zh: 消息类型 (0=回显应答, 3=不可达, 8=回显请求, 11=超时)

code.en: Subtype code, meaning depends on type field
code.zh: 子类型代码，含义取决于type字段

payload.en: Type-specific data (e.g. echo ID+seq, or original packet header)
payload.zh: 类型相关数据 (如回显的ID+序列号，或原始包头)
